race.comment: BUENOS (5) gets the apprentice on board today after disappointing on the heavy deck in Highway grade last time out. Back to country level is a big tick though and lands here in the easiest race she's seen in some time. Gets a few gear changes that can see her back to winning ways. WILLINGHAM (4) comes through a much tougher race on resumption, tackling midweek company first-up at Canterbury. Outclassed there, but back to this level suits and he can turn in an improved effort. ANARITA (7) can improve on the fresh effort as she drops to country level. STORMBRINGER (13) has tackled Highway company to begin this campaign and now comes back to an easier assignment. Can turn his form right around.
